chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7566 of 2018 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on M.A No.33176/18 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.33177/2018 (Ex/A) 3. For Hearing of Main Case. -------------------------------------------- 31.10.2018. Petitioner present in person. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2 & 3. The instant petition has been filed on the ground that the respondent No.1 may be restrained from transferring the petitioner anywhere else. Petitioner was enquired as to how this petition is maintainable against the transfer, he has no reply. Since transfer and posting is always prerogative of the authority hence cannot be challenged as a right. The petition therefore, does not lie against the transfer of a public servant. The petition is not maintainable, which stands dismissed in limine along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
